message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "index.jsp" as index.jsp
participant "basket.jsp" as basket.jsp
participant "Order" as Order
participant "Pay" as Pay
participant "LogicFacade" as LogicFacade
participant "OrderMapper" as OrderMapper
participant "Database" as Database

note right of User
We assume user is logged in
endnote

User -> index.jsp: user clicks "add to cart"
index.jsp -> Order: [for each cupcake] AddToOrder()
Order -> index.jsp: redirect (msg "added to basket")
index.jsp -> User: display msg
User -> index.jsp: user clicks "show basket"
index.jsp -> basket.jsp: ShowBasket()
basket.jsp -> Pay: Pay()
Pay -> LogicFacade: Check date
Pay -> LogicFacade: Check if logged in
Pay -> LogicFacade: Check balance
LogicFacade -> Pay: saveOrder()
OrderMapper -> LogicFacade: saveOrder()
LogicFacade -> OrderMapper: returns
OrderMapper -> Database: saves order
OrderMapper -> LogicFacade: returns
LogicFacade -> Pay: return
Pay -> index.jsp: redirect (msg "order placed")
index.jsp -> User: display msg

@enduml
